mediapackage.originendpoint.cmafencrypti.Docs: An optional 128-bit, 16-byte hex value represented by a 32-character string, used in conjunction with the key for encrypting blocks. If you don't specify a value, then MediaPackage creates the constant initialization vector (IV).
Number of seconds before AWS Elemental MediaPackage rotates to a new key. By default, rotation is set to 60 seconds. Set to `0` to disable key rotation.
Parameters for the SPEKE key provider.
